metadata.label: gen2/Fireblocks-SRE
metadata.title: Site Reliability Engineer
metadata.team_direction: Fireblocks is a leader in providing secure solutions for digital assets and blockchain technology

portfolio_review.title: Site Reliability Engineer
revision_priority: 补一条明确指向 Fireblocks 业务语境的安全/高可用基础设施叙事，避免简历看起来只是通用后端与平台经验。
在 DiDi 和 TikTok 的角色说明中再补 scope 限定语，降低“分析岗却承担工程 ownership”带来的可信度追问。

findings.issue: Summary bullets are positioning statements rather than action-led bullets, so they scan less cleanly under the stated formatting rule.
findings.fix: Rewrite each summary line to start with an action verb or role-action phrase, for example: "Builds reliability-focused backend services...", "Operates cloud and platform tooling...", "Applies systems judgment to complex analysis...".

findings.field: TikTok Experience project bullets; DiDi Experience project bullets
findings.issue: `team-maintained` is bolded in multiple bullets. The bolding rule only allows emphasis on technologies and quantitative signals outside Skills.
findings.fix: Remove bold from qualifier words such as `team-maintained`, and keep bold only on stack terms and metrics.

findings.issue: The opening sentence still foregrounds a transition from data analysis to software engineering, so the first-screen framing is weaker than a direct SRE/backend pitch.
findings.fix: Lead with `Security-focused backend engineer` or `Reliability-focused backend/SRE engineer`, then move the transition clause later in the sentence or trim it.

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Rework Professional Summary bullet 1 so it opens with a direct backend/SRE/security identity instead of the career-transition clause.
[SHOULD] Make the three Summary bullets more action-led for faster scanability.
[SHOULD] Remove bold from qualifier phrases like `team-maintained` and keep emphasis only on technologies and key metrics.
[NICE] If you want a stronger Fireblocks fit, add one bridge phrase connecting security ops, auditability, or release hardening to secure infrastructure.
